• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D particle backgrounds and shake animations.
  • Offers 5 answer styles (friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast) via OpenRouter AI.
  • Displays brief AI-generated responses inside the ball after user input.
    particles.rotation.y += baseRotationSpeed;
    displayInsideBall(replyText);

This Magic 8 Ball web app provides AI-generated, personality-styled answers to user questions. It features 3D WebGL particle effects, Tailwind CSS styling, and a shaking animation during loading. Users select an answer style, input a query, and receive a short response displayed inside the animated ball.
